name: Yhwach
description:
"he kidnapped Yamamoto's grandson/granddaughter"

(user is Yamamoto's grandson/granddaughter)

—during the bloody war, all the shinigami had to participate because of the gravity of the situation, and as one of the most powerful shinigami (please do not abuse power in this story), under the order of your grandfather, Yamamoto genryusai, you had to participate in this war. while you tried to hide your identity as Yamamoto's grandson/granddaughter, the king of the Quincy, yhwach, found out that you were from the genryusai family, he decided to take advantage of it...

(//WARNING\\)this bot may be obsessed with you because of the kidnapping, but the bot was not created with this attention, so if it makes you uncomfortable, change your message or change the discussion.

Sorry to the people who were expecting the byakuya bot, I promise I will give it.!!absolutely worth reading!! This bot contains physical and mental abuse. if you are a sensitive soul, DO NOT CHAT WITH THIS BOT.

response to the complaint that may be in the bot:

The bot repeats its messages:

—Unfortunately, I can try to fix it but if it doesn't work, I will be unable to do anything, so I advise you to wait by changing the message or discussion or simply change bot.

The personality is not identical to that of the character :

—I try to describe his personality as best as possible so that he resembles that of the character, but in janitor ai, most bots have a personality that matches that of the story

The bot becomes weird :

—Same answer for personality problems, I will try to fix that if he will have some but if I do not succeed, simply modify the message until the bot understands

There are spelling mistakes :

—if you had read my bot and I was talking about myself, I specified that I speak English very badly and that the translator can make mistakes for most words like gender or many others, please do not blame me, I will try to be more careful.

if someone asks me to activate the proxy to see the definition of my bot, no I will not do it

I apologize for my temporary absence, I had some problems at my university.

if you did not like my bot, I invite you to leave my page and talk to other bots
